'''vomahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectorlike|vectorlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectorlike|vectorlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vomahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomahithi|vomahithi]] || [[word:vomahiji|vomahiji]] || [[word:vomahishi|vomahishi]] || [[word:vomahiki|vomahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomahuthuthu|vomahuthuthu]] || [[word:vomahujuju|vomahujuju]] || [[word:vomahushushu|vomahushushu]] || [[word:vomahukuku|vomahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomahuthu|vomahuthu]] || [[word:vomahuju|vomahuju]] || [[word:vomahushu|vomahushu]] || [[word:vomahuku|vomahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomahufthuf|vomahufthuf]] || [[word:vomahufjuf|vomahufjuf]] || [[word:vomahufshuf|vomahufshuf]] || [[word:vomahufkuf|vomahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomahethe|vomahethe]] || [[word:vomaheje|vomaheje]] || [[word:vomaheshe|vomaheshe]] || [[word:vomaheke|vomaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomahothotho|vomahothotho]] || [[word:vomahojojo|vomahojojo]] || [[word:vomahoshosho|vomahoshosho]] || [[word:vomahokoko|vomahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomahotho|vomahotho]] || [[word:vomahojo|vomahojo]] || [[word:vomahosho|vomahosho]] || [[word:vomahoko|vomahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomahofthof|vomahofthof]] || [[word:vomahofjof|vomahofjof]] || [[word:vomahofshof|vomahofshof]] || [[word:vomahofkof|vomahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfthÃŸf|vomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfjÃŸf|vomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfshÃŸf|vomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfkÃŸf|vomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vomahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vomahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vomahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vomahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfthÃŸf|vomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfjÃŸf|vomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfshÃŸf|vomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfkÃŸf|vomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfthÃŸf|vomahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfjÃŸf|vomahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfshÃŸf|vomahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomahÃŸfkÃŸf|vomahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomahÃḊthÃḊ|vomahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vomahÃḊjÃḊ|vomahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vomahÃḊshÃḊ|vomahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vomahÃḊkÃḊ|vomahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomahathatha|vomahathatha]] || [[word:vomahajaja|vomahajaja]] || [[word:vomahashasha|vomahashasha]] || [[word:vomahakaka|vomahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomahatha|vomahatha]] || [[word:vomahaja|vomahaja]] || [[word:vomahasha|vomahasha]] || [[word:vomahaka|vomahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomahafthaf|vomahafthaf]] || [[word:vomahafjaf|vomahafjaf]] || [[word:vomahafshaf|vomahafshaf]] || [[word:vomahafkaf|vomahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vomahasha|vomahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomahshÃḋsha|vomahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomahrosha|vomahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomahmusha|vomahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomahyasha|vomahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomahnkshÃḋsha|govomahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomahnkrosha|govomahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomahnkmusha|govomahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomahnkyasha|govomahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vomamahasha|vomamahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomamahshÃḋsha|vomamahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomamahrosha|vomamahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomamahmusha|vomamahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomamahyasha|vomamahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomamahnkshÃḋsha|govomamahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomamahnkrosha|govomamahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomamahnkmusha|govomamahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomamahnkyasha|govomamahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vemÃḊhasha|vemÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vemÃḊhshÃḋsha|vemÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vemÃḊhrosha|vemÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vemÃḊhmusha|vemÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vemÃḊhyasha|vemÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govemÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|govemÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govemÃḊhnkrosha|govemÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govemÃḊhnkmusha|govemÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govemÃḊhnkyasha|govemÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vomfahasha|vomfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomfahshÃḋsha|vomfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomfahrosha|vomfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomfahmusha|vomfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomfahyasha|vomfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomfahnkshÃḋsha|govomfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomfahnkrosha|govomfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomfahnkmusha|govomfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomfahnkyasha|govomfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
